wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.description: Thermal contrast, manual therapies, and breathwork — a curated journey to restore your body's natural balance.

medicine.title: Medicine
medicine.description: Clinical protocols bridging regenerative science and integrative medicine to address the root causes of imbalance.

community.title: Community
community.description: A living ecosystem of people united by a shared commitment to health, movement, learning, and meaningful connection.

manualTherapies.title: Manual Therapies
manualTherapies.description: Skilled hands releasing tension, restoring mobility, and deepening your sense of physical ease.

thermalContrast.title: Thermal contrast
thermalContrast.description: Cold immersion and dry saunas to activate the nervous system, boost circulation, and sharpen mental resilience.

breathingSessions.title: Breathing Sessions
breathingSessions.description: Structured breathwork to calm the mind, regulate the nervous system, and cultivate lasting inner stillness.

redLightTherapy.title: Red Light Therapy
redLightTherapy.description: Targeted red and near-infrared light to accelerate cellular repair, reduce inflammation, and support deep tissue recovery.

functionalWellBeing.title: Functional Well-being
functionalWellBeing.description: Personalized protocols aligning movement, recovery, and lifestyle around your unique health goals.

regenerativeMedicine.title: Regenerative Medicine
regenerativeMedicine.description: Treatments that activate the body's own repair mechanisms — promoting deep, long-term healing from within.

intravenousTherapy.title: Intravenous Therapy
intravenousTherapy.description: Vitamins, minerals, and nutrients infused directly into the bloodstream for immediate cellular impact.

hyperbaricChambers.title: Hyperbaric Chambers
hyperbaricChambers.description: Pressurized oxygen therapy that floods tissues with healing oxygen — speeding recovery and sharpening focus.

runningClub.title: Running Club
runningClub.description: Group runs along curated routes — structured training with the energy and accountability of a like-minded community.

educationAndPrograms.title: Education and Programs
educationAndPrograms.description: Talks, workshops, and immersive programs that deepen your health knowledge and empower real, lasting change.

memberships.title: Memberships
memberships.description: Tiered memberships for consistent access to Essentia's full ecosystem of wellness, medicine, and community.
